prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: LST-MILITARY-CITY-50PC-SET Product Type: TOY_VEHICLE_SET Brand (from catalog): KidPlay Products Existing Title: Deluxe 50pc Military Command Micro Wheels Kids Complete Toy Car Play Set Description: The 50pc Military Rescue Toy Set is a great addition to any kid's toy car collection. Each set comes with all of the military rescue vehicles and soldiers needed to protect and rescue other toys: tanks, trucks, planes, soldiers and even helicopters.

Each set is constructed of Die Cast metal and durable plastic, and all of the vehicles feature free moving wheels. Kids will love zooming around pretend areas with these toy cars.

This is a great gift idea for young kids and toy car collectors alike. Search Terms: kids toys boys cars race Features: - Tanks, Trucks, Planes, Traffic Cones & Helicopters - Die Cast Metal & Durable Plastic - Military Rescue Themed Toy Vehicles & Soldiers - Great Gift Idea for Kids - Ideal holiday stiocking stuffers and gifts for boys === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: KidPlay Products 50-pc Military Rescue Toy Vehicle Set

openai.item_name: KidPlay Products 50-Pc Military Rescue Toy Vehicle Set

anthropic.title_differentiation: 50 Piece Set, Die Cast Metal And Plastic, Tanks, Trucks, Planes, Helicopters, Soldiers, Free Moving Wheels

openai.title_differentiation: Die Cast Metal And Durable Plastic, Free Rolling Wheels, Tanks Trucks Planes Helicopters Soldiers, Great Gift For Kids
